title: Senior Doctor - Hinduja Healthcare - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Hinduja Healthcare - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Hinduja Healthcare, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Doctor for our Srinagar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Hinduja Healthcare:
Hinduja Healthcare is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in CPT Codes

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hinduja Healthcare!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
